Notice Of Motion And Motion For Approval Of Settlement Of Claim For Civil Penalties Under Labor Code 2698 Et Seq.
Off Calendar Aug-27-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Joseph Breall, Esq., Breal & Breal, 415-345-0545, jmbreallaw.com for Plaintiff,
Brandon K. Kahoush,Esq., FISHER & PHILLIPS LLP (415) 490-9000 bkahoush@fisherphillips.com (415) 490-9000 Attorneys for Defendant 24/7 ROOTER & PLUMBING SERVICES, INC.

Hearing is held. NOT ARGUED. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WINSTON ROBINSON's Motion For Approval Of Settlement Of Claim For Civil Penalties Under Labor Code 2698 Et Seq.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for approval of settlement of claim for civil penalties under Labor Code 2698 et seq." is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
